title: erysimum froehneri
intro: Erysimum froehneri, also known as Froehner's wallflower, is a flowering plant species within the Brassicaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Erysimum froehneri include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
